noActionItems: No suggestions or issues right now.

hint.voiceLoading: {{petName}} is quietly sorting through the scene…
hint.voiceUnavailable: {{petName}} could not get a fresh read just now.
hint.voiceIdle: {{petName}} is keeping an eye on this: {{fallback}}

notice.reviewPetAuthExpired: Pet runtime authentication expired. Re-login and retry.

reminderSummary.mention: {{actor}} prepared a draft you can review in chat.
reminderSummary.replyRequired: {{actor}} prepared a reply draft you can review in chat.
reminderSummary.mentionVoice: {{petName}} noticed that {{actor}} just prepared a draft.
reminderSummary.replyRequiredVoice: {{petName}} brought {{actor}}'s reply draft to your side.

summary.moveActive: {{taskId}} is mounted by {{actorId}}, but the board status should be synced to active{{suffix}}
summary.syncWaitingUser: {{taskId}} looks like it is waiting on the user; sync waiting_on=user{{suffix}}
summary.syncBlocked: {{actorId}} reported blockers on {{taskId}}; sync blocker details{{suffix}}
summary.stalledActiveTask: {{taskId}} has stayed active too long without progress; re-confirm the next step{{suffix}}
summary.ownershipDrift: {{taskId}} is still assigned to {{actorId}}, but execution focus drifted; re-confirm the owner{{suffix}}
summary.assignActiveOwner: {{taskId}} is already active but has no owner; assign it to {{actorId}}{{suffix}}
summary.escalatedWaitingUser: {{taskId}} has looked like waiting_user for multiple cycles; close the user dependency now{{suffix}}

draft.moveActive: {{actorId}} already mounted this task; sync its status to active.
draft.syncWaitingUser: {{actorId}} is currently focused on {{focus}}; add waiting_on=user and record the user dependency.
draft.syncWaitingUserClose: {{actorId}} is currently focused on {{focus}}; close waiting_on=user explicitly and assign the next owner.
draft.syncBlocked: {{actorId}} reported blockers; sync blockers and waiting_on back to the task. Blockers: {{blockers}}.
draft.stalledActiveTaskBase: {{actorId}} has kept this task mounted for {{mountedMinutes}} minutes without recent task changes, and current focus is {{focus}}.
draft.stalledActiveTaskNoBlockers: Foreman should re-confirm the next step and explicitly handoff or close the task if needed.
draft.stalledActiveTaskNoBlockersEscalate: Escalate this stalled task now and make the next owner explicit if progress is still blocked.
draft.stalledActiveTaskWithBlockers: Current blockers: {{blockers}}. Sync blockers first, then decide whether to keep pushing.
draft.ownershipDriftNoActiveTask: {{actorId}} does not currently have this task mounted
draft.ownershipDrift: {{activeTaskText}}, but this task is still under the same owner. {{resolution}}
draft.ownershipDriftResolutionReconfirm: Re-confirm owner and task status first; keep it only if {{taskId}} is still the true active task, otherwise explicitly reassign or archive the stale task.
draft.ownershipDriftResolutionReassign: Treat {{taskId}} as stale unless proven otherwise, and explicitly reassign or archive it instead of keeping the old owner by default.
draft.assignActiveOwner: This task is already active but currently has no owner; assign it to {{actorId}}.
draft.escalatedWaitingUser: {{actorId}} has stayed on {{focus}} for {{mountedMinutes}} minutes across multiple cycles. Close waiting_on=user on the task and make the next owner explicit.
